nasb.text: Thus they shall provide the lamb, the grain offering and the oil, morning by morning, for a continual burnt offering.”

esv.text: Thus the lamb and the meal offering and the oil shall be provided, morning by morning, for a regular burnt offering.

cnv.text: 所以每天早晨要這樣預備羊羔、素祭和油，作常獻的燔祭。”

ccb.text: 所以，每天早晨都要预备羊羔、素祭和油，作为日常献的燔祭。
